title: TDD Enhancement Database for White Screen Prevention
description: Comprehensive TDD patterns and methodologies to prevent React white screen failures

strengths: Early detection of missing component dependencies
Isolated unit testing of error boundaries
Real integration testing of import chains
chicagoSchool.applicability: High for integration and system testing

hybridApproach.approach: Combination of both schools based on context
strengths: Comprehensive coverage from unit to integration

componentExistenceValidation.description: Test that all imported components exist and can be instantiated

implementation.example: import { render } from '@testing-library/react'; import ComponentUnderTest from '../ComponentUnderTest'; test('should import and render without errors', () => { expect(() => render(<ComponentUnderTest />)).not.toThrow(); });

errorBoundaryValidation.description: Test error boundary components catch and handle errors correctly

implementation.example: test('ErrorBoundary catches component errors', () => { const ThrowError = () => { throw new Error('Test error'); }; render(<ErrorBoundary><ThrowError /></ErrorBoundary>); expect(screen.getByText(/Something went wrong/i)).toBeInTheDocument(); });

importChainIntegrity.description: Test entire import chain from App.tsx to leaf components

implementation.example: test('App renders all routes without import errors', () => { const routes = ['/', '/agents', '/dashboard']; routes.forEach(route => { render(<MemoryRouter initialEntries={[route]}><App /></MemoryRouter>); expect(screen.queryByTestId('loading-fallback')).toBeInTheDocument(); }); });

pathAliasResolution.description: Test @/ path alias imports resolve correctly

implementation.example: test('path alias imports resolve correctly', () => { const modules = ['@/components/FallbackComponents', '@/components/ErrorBoundary']; modules.forEach(module => { expect(() => require.resolve(module)).not.toThrow(); }); });

fallbackComponentValidation.description: Test fallback components exist and render correctly

implementation.example: test('all fallback components render without errors', () => { const fallbacks = [LoadingFallback, ErrorFallback, NotFoundFallback]; fallbacks.forEach(Component => { expect(() => render(<Component />)).not.toThrow(); }); });

unitTests.focus: Individual component rendering, error boundary logic, import validation

integrationTests.focus: Component interaction, route rendering, error boundary integration

e2eTests.focus: Full application flow, white screen detection, user journey validation

preventiveTestGeneration.description: Automatically generate tests for new components and imports
preventiveTestGeneration.coverage: Component imports, error boundaries, path aliases

whiteScreenDetection.description: Automated white screen detection in CI/CD pipeline
whiteScreenDetection.coverage: All routes, error states, loading states

continuousValidation.coverage: Import chains, component availability, error boundaries

tddBestPractices: Growing Object-Oriented Software, Guided by Tests
